headline: KKR & Co. (KKR) Reports $129B Fundraising, $972M Q4 Fee-Related Earnings
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is one of the cheap stocks that will go to the moon according to Reddit. On February 5, KKR & Co. reported its 2025 earnings results, characterized by the highest fundraising in the firm’s 50-year history.
